README!!: aph_right hand (16 DOF, 4 fingers — Thumb, Index, Middle, Ring; no pinky). fingertip link is the distal phalanx (_3 link); center_offset pushes the keypoint past the link origin to the actual fingertip pad along the link's principal axis. The _tip links in the URDF are fixed-joint visual stubs (parent joint origin from _3 plus tip-mesh half-length ~0.024 ≈ fingertip pad world position). The URDF was retrofitted with a `virtual_base` fixed-joint parent (same pattern as v6_right) so the base frame matches the GeoRT/allegro_right convention (X=palm normal, Y=palm-to-thumb, Z=palm-to-middle, origin at middle-finger MCP). Verify with `python glove_based/geort/env/hand_debug.py --hand aph_right`.
name: aph_right

fingertip_link.name: index
fingertip_link._offset_note: index_3 origin → fingertip pad: index_tip_mount xyz=(0.0016, -0.0005, 0.0178) plus tip mesh half-length ~0.024 along its local +Z. Result: small radial tilt (+0.0036 X) and ~0.042 Z.

fingertip_link.name: middle
fingertip_link._offset_note: Pure +Z along the link's principal axis (middle is the centerline finger; no radial tilt).

fingertip_link.name: ring
fingertip_link._offset_note: Mirror of index: ring_tip_mount xyz=(-0.0016, -0.0005, 0.0178) plus tip extension ~0.024 → slight ulnar tilt (-0.0036 X) and ~0.042 Z.

fingertip_link.name: thumb
fingertip_link._offset_note: Thumb tip extends along +X: thumb_tip_mount xyz=(0.029, 0, 0) plus tip mesh half-length ~0.024 ≈ 0.053 along local +X.
